description: This segment features a static end-screen graphic of the Vitruvian Man with a call-to-action to subscribe, accompanied by background music as indicated by the transcript. (objects: Vitruvian Man drawing, Subscribe button, Geometric circle and square lines) | This video segment features a static end-screen graphic displaying a 'SUBSCRIBE' call-to-action button overlaid on a cosmic galaxy background
